starterTools.name: send_discord_message
starterTools.description: Send a message to a Discord channel.

inputSchema.name: channelId
inputSchema.description: Channel ID (enable Developer Mode in Discord to copy IDs)

starterTools.name: list_guild_channels
starterTools.description: List all channels in a Discord server (guild).

starterTools.name: get_channel_messages
starterTools.description: Retrieve recent messages from a Discord channel.

inputSchema.name: limit
inputSchema.description: Number of messages to fetch (max 100, default 20)
